vocab.example: Back in high school, I decided to sign up for the local basketball team to improve my fitness and social circle.

vocab.meaning: có mặt, xuất hiện (thường là để tập luyện hoặc thi đấu)
vocab.example: Being part of a competitive squad taught me the importance of showing up consistently, rain or shine.

vocab.meaning: ngừng tham gia dần dần, loại biên
vocab.example: I eventually had to phase out my involvement in the football club as my academic workload became too demanding.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua đối thủ, chiếm ưu thế
vocab.example: Our relay team spent weeks perfecting our baton passes just to get ahead of our rivals in the final heat.

vocab.meaning: kiệt sức, mệt mỏi vì quá tải
vocab.example: I loved being on the swimming team, but the grueling 5 AM sessions nearly caused me to burn out by mid-season.

vocab.meaning: bỏ lỡ cơ hội hoặc trải nghiệm
vocab.example: Unfortunately, I had to miss out on the final tournament because of a minor injury I sustained during practice.

vocab.meaning: ôn lại, cải thiện kỹ năng đã lâu không dùng
vocab.example: Whenever I rejoin the volleyball team for summer leagues, I have to brush up on my serving technique.
Even when we were down by ten points, our captain urged us to carry on playing with the same intensity.
Our team ran into some stiff opposition during the regional qualifiers, which really tested our mental fortitude.

vocab.meaning: thu hẹp, rút gọn danh sách (ứng viên/thành viên)
vocab.example: The coach had to narrow down the squad from thirty players to just fifteen for the overseas tour.
